title: SketchMeta
description: Per-sketch metadata stored at sketches/<id>/meta.json. Written by CLI scripts, read by the view-only UI. No database.

id.description: URL-safe slug; MUST equal the containing folder name and the routing id.

name.description: Human-friendly display name (original input to create-sketch).

dateCreated.description: ISO 8601 date the sketch was created. Immutable after creation.

dateUpdated.description: ISO 8601 date of the latest commit that changed sketch code. Equals dateCreated until update-sketch-meta runs.

createdBy.description: Git user name captured at creation time. Immutable after creation.

lastUpdatedBy.description: Git user name of the latest commit that changed sketch code. Equals createdBy until update-sketch-meta runs.
